concerns.text: Task T013 implements motif/Hi-C validation but lacks an explicit step to EXCLUDE CREs failing FR-014 from the downstream GLS input. The spec (FR-014) mandates exclusion of unvalidated distal CREs; the task description only mentions 'validation' without the mandatory filtering logic, risking the inclusion of invalid pairs in T016.

Task T014 flags collinear CREs (VIF > 5) but does not explicitly state the EXCLUSION of these CREs from the GLS model (FR-012). The spec requires exclusion, not just flagging. Without an explicit 'exclude' step in the task, the GLS implementation (T016) may inadvertently include collinear CREs.

Task T017 mentions 'enforce q ≤ 0.05 cutoff' but does not explicitly link this to the filtering of the output table (FR-007, SC-001). The spec requires the final ranked table to contain ONLY significant CREs. The task must explicitly state that the output generation (T018) consumes only the filtered subset.

Task T022 implements the permutation test but omits the specific requirement for 'spatially-constrained block permutation' (FR-006, Plan Phase 7). A generic permutation test would violate the statistical rigor required by the spec and the plan's methodology.

Task T032 computes summit match percentage but fails to specify that this must be calculated for the 'top-10 CREs in the final ranked table (FDR ≤ 0.05)' as required by SC-005. Verifying against an unfiltered set would violate the success criterion.

Task T007 mentions 'generate overlap statistics' but does not explicitly require the calculation of the 'top-20 CRE overlap percentage' between FDR thresholds as mandated by FR-003. Vague 'overlap statistics' may not satisfy the specific metric required for SC-004.
